title: Mob capturing tool pyxal-ated
description: A texture meant to be more accurate to the in game recipe
body:
_I made this texture pack on a wim lol_

The MCT (Mob Capturing Tool) is crafted from leather glass and a diamond, but it just looks like a bright lime ball. So I changed that! and no the texture is coherent with the recipe :)

**🔌 Currently supported versions:**
1.18.2, 1.19-1.19.3, 1.20-1.20.1
I have plans to port it to other versions I just need to take some time to do it

For any inquiries or issues, contact me on discord: pyxal42
